allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $r = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3000/api/ai-usage; Write-Host "sessionRuns: $\($r.sessionRuns\)"; Write-Host "totalRuns: $\($r.totalRuns\)"; $r.history | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.timestamp\) | $\($_.provider\) | success=$\($_.success\) | $\($_.durationMs\)ms" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3000/api/debug/last-signals-raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { Write-Host "last-signals-raw: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 1 | Select-Object -First 5\)" } else { Write-Host "No signals yet" })
